---
title: "Emi"

output: html_document
---

# Facts about myself!
+ I have a tuxedo cat named Fred!
+ I am from Keene, New Hampshire
+ I love protecting marine species!
+ I live in Auke Bay, Alaska 
+ I love tidepooling and walking Juneau's rocky beaches!

# What do I do at work?
## Great Question!
+ Sort salmon bycatch envelopes
+ Process samples from tissue to genotype using the GTseq method
+ Practice R with Arabella and Professor Carl!

<br><br>


![Here is Fred in front of Statter Harbor! He is meowing!](C:\Users\emi.boyd-tucker\Pictures\Saved Pictures\fred_.jpg){width=30%}

![Auke Bay, Alaska! This is winter.](data:image/jpeg;base64,){width=30%}

![Illumina MiSeq System used for the GTseq method. Very useful!](data:image/jpeg;base64,){width=30%}
